topic: red fermentation temperature and cap extraction
trigger_keywords: extraccion de taninos durante la fermentacion
práctica enológica se utiliza para aumentar la extracción de color y taninos en tintos
temperaturas mas altas en vinos tintos
favorece la extraccion de taninos y color

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Red must ferments with grape skins while the cap is managed and temperature is sufficiently warm.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Remontage renews contact between liquid and skins, while warmth and rising alcohol increase the extraction of phenolic compounds.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: More colour and tannin pass into the wine, increasing depth and structure.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: More colour and tannin pass into the wine, increasing depth and structure.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
